playbook.intent: One feature slice shipped to staging in a single focused day: spec written, code generated against acceptance, self-review pass complete, PR merged, deploy verified.
playbook.scope: One feature slice shipped to staging in a single focused day: spec written, code generated against acceptance, self-review pass complete, PR merged, deploy verified.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Spec the slice
stage.intent: Write the spec before touching code.

tasks.task: Write a tight one-feature spec with acceptance criteria
List explicit non-goals for this slice

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when spec fits one screen AND every AC is testable.

stage.name: Generate against acceptance
stage.intent: Use the AI agent with the spec as the brief, not vibes.

tasks.task: Feed the spec + relevant context to the coding agent
Constrain the diff size to one logical change
Ask for tests against the acceptance criteria first

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when diff is reviewable in <=10 minutes and tests cover all AC.

stage.name: Self-code review
stage.intent: Solo PR review using a written rubric, not gut.

tasks.task: Walk the self-code-review rubric line by line
Re-run lint, types, and the relevant test scope

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all rubric items are green or explicitly deferred with a ticket.

stage.name: Ship to staging
stage.intent: Push the slice behind a flag where risky.

tasks.task: Deploy to staging with the feature flag default-off
Verify the AC manually against staging

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all AC pass on staging.

stage.name: Merge + production gate
stage.intent: Merge with a clear deploy decision.

tasks.task: Squash-merge to main with a tight commit message
Decide flag rollout strategy (canary / all-users / off)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when production health is green for 15 minutes post-deploy.

stage.name: Daily-ship rubric
stage.intent: Close the day with a one-line ship verdict.

tasks.task: Score the day against the daily-ship rubric
Log what slipped or got cut
Pick tomorrows first slice while context is hot

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when daily score is written and the next slice is named.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content daily-sdd-spec-vibe-code-review-cycle --format md, agent: faion get-content daily-sdd-spec-vibe-code-review-cycle --format context, json: faion get-content daily-sdd-spec-vibe-code-review-cycle --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
